evidence_corrections.correction: Path changed from playwright.config.ts to tests/e2e/fixtures/server.ts; pattern updated to BASE_PORT.*shardIndex.*MAX_WORKERS. Matches line 79.
Status advanced from PARTIAL to SATISFIED — implementation is correct, m4 evidence spec had wrong file path.

matrix.description: Coverage spans every currently-shipping surface
matrix.notes: 9 @constraint B1 annotations across specs; coverage.spec.ts meta-test enforces breadth

matrix.description: Failed e2e blocks release tags
matrix.notes: release.yml needs: [smoke, e2e]; Test=N/A (CI infrastructure behavior)

matrix.description: Flake rate ≤ 5% over trailing 50 CI runs
matrix.notes: Statistical threshold requires 50 CI run history to measure. No @constraint B3 annotation.

matrix.description: Playwright is the test framework
matrix.notes: @constraint T1 in playwright.config.ts; exact pin in package.json; dependabot.yml

matrix.description: Browser matrix = Chromium only for v1
matrix.notes: @constraint T2 in playwright.config.ts; single projects entry for chromium

matrix.description: Tests run against production -tags=prod binary
matrix.notes: server.ts comment // Satisfies: T3; ci.yml build-binary job; PHRONESIS_BIN env var

matrix.description: Per-worker data isolation via PHRONESIS_PAGES_DIR + unique port
matrix.notes: @constraint T4 in server.ts; port formula BASE_PORT+shardIndex*MAX_WORKERS+workerIndex at line 79; E11 corrected

matrix.description: Auth fixture uses storageState — log in once per worker
matrix.notes: @constraint T5 in auth.ts; storageState 6 matches; auth.spec.ts validates session

matrix.description: tests/e2e/ with feature-grouped subdirs
matrix.notes: coverage.spec.ts enumerates REQUIRED_DIRS; directory structure present; meta-test enforces drift

matrix.description: Third-party network calls intercepted via page.route
matrix.notes: network.ts fixture applies page.route globally but no spec asserts an external request was blocked. Defensive constraint — phronesis frontend makes no external calls today.

matrix.description: Web-first assertions with default auto-retry throughout
matrix.notes: 5 @constraint T8 annotations; no waitForSelector calls (only in a comment); .toBe() only on API response values

matrix.description: Test titles read as sentences about user behavior
matrix.notes: All 26 test titles are sentence-form. No @constraint U1 annotation. Test=N/A (naming convention, not executable).

matrix.description: Failures produce actionable artifacts (trace + screenshot + video)
matrix.notes: playwright.config.ts: trace=on-first-retry, screenshot=only-on-failure, video=retain-on-failure. ci.yml uploads playwright-report. Test=N/A (Playwright framework guarantees config behavior). Docs gap: no @constraint U2 annotation — see G4.

matrix.description: No real production credentials in test code
matrix.notes: @constraint S1 in auth.spec.ts; credentials = admin/admin123 (shipped dev defaults, not production)

matrix.description: OIDC tests use existing HMAC stub verifier
matrix.notes: @constraint S2 in oidc.spec.ts; mintOIDCToken() uses createHmac('sha256'); PHRONESIS_OIDC_ENABLED=1

matrix.description: Test data is ephemeral — tempdir per CI run, auto-cleaned
matrix.notes: @constraint S3 in server.ts (// Satisfies: S3); tmpdir auto-cleanup in worker teardown

matrix.description: E2E runs as own GH Actions job, parallel to test + lint
matrix.notes: ci.yml: e2e job runs in parallel with test job (annotation line 109). Test=N/A (CI infrastructure).

matrix.description: E2E suite wall-clock p95 ≤ 5 min on GH Actions
matrix.notes: 3-shard + build-binary architecture satisfies Code (BOUNDARY check). Statistical measurement requires 10 CI runs. No history yet.

matrix.description: Retries = 2 on first failure, 0 on pass
matrix.notes: playwright.config.ts: retries: process.env.CI ? 2 : 0. O3 annotation in config comment.

matrix.description: All runs upload trace + screenshot + video artifacts on failure
matrix.notes: playwright.config.ts use.trace + use.screenshot + use.video. ci.yml uploads blob-report-N per shard, playwright-report via e2e-report job. Test=N/A.

matrix.description: Playwright version pinned exact in frontend/package.json
matrix.notes: @playwright/test: 1.50.0 (no caret). dependabot.yml ignores playwright auto-upgrades.

matrix.description: Flake-rate dashboard + alerting at >5% threshold
matrix.notes: flake-monitor.yml implements awk-based computation. No unit test for the awk pipeline correctness.

gaps.issue: Statistical flake-rate threshold (≤ 5% / 50 runs) cannot be verified before CI run history accumulates.
gaps.action: After 50 main-branch CI runs, re-run /manifold:m5-verify e2e-testing. Flake-monitor.yml will surface any alert before then.

gaps.issue: No spec asserts that the page.route() fixture actually blocked a non-localhost request. The interception fires but no test verifies the abort behavior.
gaps.action: In tests/e2e/fixtures/network.ts or a new spec, add: await page.route('https://example.com/', r => r.abort()); const req = page.waitForRequest('https://example.com/'); // navigate; expect(req).rejects.toThrow(). Alternative: use page.on('requestfailed') to assert a blocked request.

gaps.issue: No @constraint U1 annotation in any spec file. Machine traceability gap.
gaps.action: Add // @constraint U1 comment to each test.describe() block header (26 test titles — all already sentence-form, so the implementation is correct).

gaps.issue: No @constraint U2 annotation anywhere. Test=N/A (Playwright framework guarantees behavior configured in playwright.config.ts — not user-testable). Docs gap only.
gaps.action: Add // @constraint U2 - trace+screenshot+video on failure to playwright.config.ts use block comment. No code change needed.

gaps.issue: Statistical boundary (p95 ≤ 5 min) requires 10 CI run history on main. Architecture is implemented (Code ✓); no run history exists yet.
gaps.action: After 10 main-branch CI runs, check GH Actions timing for the e2e job. If p95 > 5 min, investigate shard balance and binary download times. Re-run /manifold:m5-verify.

gaps.issue: The awk-based flake-rate calculation in flake-monitor.yml has no unit test. A logic error in the pipeline would silently fail to alert at the 5% threshold.
gaps.action: Write a test script at tests/e2e/flake-monitor-test.sh: feed a synthetic results.json (with known retry patterns) and assert the awk computation outputs the expected rate. Add to Makefile as make test-flake-monitor.

gaps.issue: E11 in m4 had wrong path (playwright.config.ts) and wrong pattern (base_port.*shard_index). Corrected in m5.
gaps.action: RESOLVED — E11 updated to tests/e2e/fixtures/server.ts with pattern BASE_PORT.*shardIndex.*MAX_WORKERS. RT-4 status advanced to SATISFIED.

statistical_verification.notes: B3 and O2 require CI run history (G1, G5). O6 implementation exists but has no unit test (G6). All three are non-blocking under default strictness.

reversibility_check.result: PASSED — no ONE_WAY steps; REVERSIBLE_WITH_COST steps acknowledged
